pi_items.source: Extracted the pre-built gvSIG project file (countries_base.gvsproj) and confirmed the layer name inside state.xml matches 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries'.
Downloaded ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp directly from Natural Earth URL (naciscdn.org) and read it with python geopandas, which returned exactly 177 records.
Checked the exact column names in the downloaded shapefile using python geopandas. 'GDP_MD_EST' does not exist; the actual column is named 'GDP_MD'.

privileged_info_summary: The 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' dataset downloaded from Natural Earth contains exactly 177 records. The actual dataset's attribute columns include 'NAME', 'POP_EST', and 'CONTINENT', but it uses 'GDP_MD' instead of the claimed 'GDP_MD_EST'.
